heading: Payments; installments, advances or reimbursement, and adjustments
label: 1226a–1 Payments; installments, advances or reimbursement, and adjustments
text: Payments pursuant to grants or contracts under any applicable program may be made in installments, and in advance or by way of reimbursement, with necessary adjustments on account of overpayments or underpayments, as the Secretary may determine.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to its renumbering by .section 1232d of this titlePub. L. 95–561

Prior ProvisionsA prior was classified to prior to repeal by .section 423 of Pub. L. 90–247section 1231b of this titlePub. L. 103–382Another prior was renumbered section 439, and is classified to .section 423 of Pub. L. 90–247section 1232b of this title
